stdout.expected_after: An open goal exists and `pcl next` can route work from it.
stdout.human_guidance: A human should choose or confirm this state transition before the command is run.

check: 推奨コマンドの対象を確認したか
実行後の durable な状態変化を許容できるか
next_options: 追加の証跡を確認する
human_guidance_ja.why_blocked: この操作は durable なループ状態を変更します。実行する前に人間の確認が必要です。

options.label: Approve
options.risk_if_run: The command may change durable loop state; review the target before running it.
options.why_safe: Uses the recommended pcl command instead of direct state mutation.

options.label: Reject
options.risk_if_run: No rejection is recorded, so the same recommendation may remain next.
options.why_safe: Read-only command; it leaves durable loop state unchanged.

options.label: Hold
options.risk_if_run: The loop may remain stopped until a human records a more durable outcome.
options.why_safe: Read-only command; it keeps the current state intact.

options.label: Request more evidence
options.risk_if_run: The decision remains pending until an operator runs a state-changing pcl command.
options.why_safe: Read-only review command; it does not mutate project-loop state.

stdout.recommendation: Run or decline the recommended command: pcl goal create --title 'Reach feature coverage'
stdout.why_blocked: Human confirmation is required before this recommended state transition should run.
